title: Human Gates, Permissions, and Reversible Autonomy · State Workshop
summary: Set human review points for a consequential operations agent. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a risk-tiered approval matrix while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify actions by reversibility, blast radius, sensitivity, and external impact.
Place approvals immediately before consequential effects with enough evidence to decide.
Give each loop and tool only the capabilities and data required for its current goal.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
